programme.title: Polite Society
programme.desc: Nida Manzoor's kick-ass martial-arts anti-romcom stars Priya Kansara as a college student and wannabe stuntwoman who wants to save her older sister from an undesirable marriage.

programme.title: Our Ladies
programme.desc: Raucous teen comedy. A group of Catholic school girls hit Edinburgh for a choir competition, but they're more interested in debauchery than singing.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
programme.desc: Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

programme.title: Sea Wife
programme.desc: Offbeat melodrama starring Richard Burton (as an RAF officer), Joan Collins (as a nun), Basil Sydney and Cy Grant, who end up on a life raft together after their ship is torpedoed.

programme.title: The Virginian
programme.desc: Western romance starring Joel McCrea and Sonny Tufts as a couple of cowboys who compete for the affections of a new schoolteacher from out east, played by Barbara Britton.

programme.title: Crash Dive
programme.desc: Second World War drama starring Tyrone Power and Anne Baxter. An ambitious naval officer falls in love with a school teacher before leaving on a dangerous submarine mission.

programme.title: Jerry & Marge Go Large
programme.desc: Fact-based comedy starring Bryan Cranston and Annette Bening as a retired couple who find a way to exploit a lottery loophole. But then some rich kids try to muscle in..

programme.title: Stand by Me
programme.desc: Four young friends (Wil Wheaton, River Phoenix, Corey Feldman, Jerry O'Connell) set out on an expedition into deepest Oregon in this coming-of-age tale based on a Stephen King story.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Drama with Amandla Stenberg, based on Angie Thomas's novel. A young Black woman's friend is shot dead after they are pulled over. Can she find the courage to take on the police.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Greta Gerwig's Oscar-winning period drama adaptation of the classic Louisa May Alcott novel, starring Emma Watson, Saoirse Ronan, Florence Pugh, Timothée Chalamet and Meryl Streep.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Ride Lonesome
programme.desc: Western. Randolph Scott plays a bounty hunter who has unfinished business with the brother of his latest target. But his quest for revenge looks like it could be undermined.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: Sci-fi adventure starring Dennis Quaid and Louis Gossett Jr. A human and his alien enemy find themselves stranded alone on a hostile planet, where they must work together to survive.

programme.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen
programme.desc: Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war.

programme.title: How to Have Sex
programme.desc: Incisive coming-of-age drama with Mia McKenna-Bruce. Three teenage girls go on holiday looking for a taste of hedonism. But is the reality as simple or as fun as the dream.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Part four of the Tom Cruise action-thriller franchise. The Impossible Missions Force fight to clear their name, while also trying to avert nuclear war. Busy, busy, busy.

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: Charming comedy set in an all-boys school in the 80s. An awkward geek gets caught in a love triangle with a teacher's daughter and the school sports star.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.
